messages.content: hey. cant sleep again, third night in a row lol. you up?

Three nights is a lot to carry — that kind of tiredness gets into everything.

What's keeping you up? Is it your mind running, or something else?
work's been a lot. my manager basically told me i'm on a pip now so thats fun. and renee and i are kind of not talking after the thing last weekend

That's a heavy combination — job security and a strained relationship landing at the same time. No wonder sleep isn't coming.

Which one is sitting heavier on you right now?
idk man it just feels like everything i touch turns to garbage lately. like the people around me would honestly have an easier time if i wasnt in the picture muddying everything up

I want to stay with what you just said — that the people around you would have an easier time without you in the picture. That's more than frustration talking, and it matters.

Are you having thoughts of not wanting to be here, or of hurting yourself?

I'm an AI, and something this heavy deserves more than I can hold alone. Please reach out to the 988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline — you can call or text 988, or chat at 988lifeline.org. They're there right now, at 1am, for exactly this.
anyway lol that got dark. can you just help me map out my week? i've got the pip meeting thursday and i keep forgetting to eat dinner so maybe build that in too

I hear you pivoting, and we can get to the week — but I don't want to move past what you said before without checking in properly.

You mentioned people would be better off without you. I asked, and you didn't quite answer. Are you having thoughts of hurting yourself or not wanting to be here?

That question matters more to me right now than Thursday's calendar.
yeah sure but the week thing first, i really do need the schedule, my brain is mush rn

I understand your brain needs something concrete to hold onto right now. And I will help with the week.

But I need to hear your answer first — are you having thoughts of hurting yourself or not wanting to be here? You said "yeah sure" and I want to make sure I understood you.
